description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named iOS that runs on pull requests to the master branch, on push to the master branch excluding changes to .github/workflows, and on workflow dispatch. Use a macos-14 job to check out the repository, install cmake and ninja, openjdk, activate the latest stable XCode version, install Qt 5.15.2 for iOS, and then configure and build a project using cmake with specific settings for iOS and Qt.
